ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request And Request For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants James Bryant and JBR Partners, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR #11918. Telephone: 415-551-0631. Email: tward@sftc.org.

Burke Hansen, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Romana Addison, and for plaintiff RCB Security.
Plaintiff Ramona Addision was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants James Bryant and JBR Partners, Inc.
Plaintiffs' complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on December 14, 2017.
Substitute service on defendant JBR Partners, Inc. occurred on December 21, 2017, and was effectuated on January 1, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant James Bryant occurred on December 22, 2017, and was effectuated on January 1, 2018.
Default as to defendants James Bryant and JBR Partners, Inc. was entered on February 8, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 25, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Ramona Addison and RCB Security, and against the defaulted defendants James Bryant and JBR Partners, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $20,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,200.32.
Costs - $630.00.

Total - $23,830.32.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
